title: Need the ability to copy and export the results of a formula

posts.author: puck4007 (Donna)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need the ability to copy the results of a formula column,

It would also be nice for results of a formula column to be included when the board is exported to Excel.

Note: A third party app is not an option. My company does not allow the use of third party apps since the security of those apps is not guaranteed by Monday. (This is the case at many Enterprise level customers.)
